args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

cpc_defs = json.loads(Path(var_call_SPAySaerO1DM0O2cd4CwBovH).read_text())

mapping = {r['symbol']: r['titleFull'] for r in cpc_defs}
assignee_codes = json.loads(var_call_h1dfrEX7n45YNbqi7HgQtEIC)

result_list = []
for assignee, codes in assignee_codes.items():
    for code in codes:
        title = mapping.get(code, '')
        result_list.append({'assignee': assignee, 'cpc_symbol': code, 'cpc_titleFull': title})

out = json.dumps(result_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(out)

result.preview:
"From the available data, the only group of citing patents that can be reliably identified as citing patents assigned to UNIV CALIFORNIA has an assignee that cannot be parsed from the natural-language “Patents_info” field (it does not contain a machine-readable `assignee_harmonized` entry). As a result, these citing patents appear under an assignee label of “UNKNOWN” in the analysis.

For this “UNKNOWN” assignee group, the primary CPC subclasses associated with their citations to UNIV CALIFORNIA patents, together with the full CPC titles, are:

- A61B5/0031 – Implanted circuitry
- A61B5/0035 – Features or image-related aspects of imaging apparatus classified in A61B5/00, e.g. for MRI, optical tomography or impedance tomography apparatus; arrangements of imaging apparatus in a room adapted for acquisition of images from more than one imaging mode, e.g. combining MRI and optical tomography
- A61B5/0066 – Optical coherence imaging
- A61B5/1128 – Measuring movement of the entire body or parts thereof, e.g. head or hand tremor, mobility of a limb using a particular sensing technique using image analysis
- A61K31/155 – Amidines (), e.g. guanidine (H2N—C(=NH)—NH2), isourea (N=C(OH)—NH2), isothiourea (—N=C(SH)—NH2)
- A61K31/352 – Heterocyclic compounds having oxygen as the only ring hetero atom, e.g. fungichromin having six-membered rings with one oxygen as the only ring hetero atom condensed with carbocyclic rings, e.g. methantheline 
- A61K31/4184 – 1,3-Diazoles condensed with carbocyclic rings, e.g. benzimidazoles
- A61K31/734 – Alginic acid
- A61K31/737 – Sulfated polysaccharides, e.g. chondroitin sulfate, dermatan sulfate
- A61K35/28 – Bone marrow; Haematopoietic stem cells; Mesenchymal stem cells of any origin, e.g. adipose-derived stem cells

As a result, these citing patents appear under an assignee label of “UNKNOWN” in the analysis.

Within the limits of the provided data, no specific named assignees (other than the generic UNIV CALIFORNIA itself, which was explicitly excluded) could be extracted for these citing patents, so they are collectively represented as an "UNKNOWN" assignee group with the CPC subclasses and titles listed above.
